Prepare data matrix and metadata for ComplexHeatmap

Source: R/IMPACT_heatmap.R
prepare_mat_meta.Rd

Prepare data matrix and metadata for ComplexHeatmap

prepare_mat_meta(
  TOP_IMPACT,
  snp.group = "Consensus",
  value.var = "mean_IMPACT",
  fill_na = 0
)

Arguments

TOP_IMPACT

A data.table of top IMPACT annotations.

snp.group

Name of the SNP group to use for metadata merge.

value.var

Name of the value column to use in the cast.

fill_na

Value to use for filling NA entries.

Value

A data.frame with loci as rows and SNP groups as columns, plus metadata columns.

See also

Other IMPACT: IMPACT_compute_enrichment(), IMPACT_files, IMPACT_get_annotation_key(), IMPACT_get_annotations(), IMPACT_get_ldscores(), IMPACT_get_top_annotations(), IMPACT_heatmap(), IMPACT_iterate_enrichment(), IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations(), IMPACT_plot_enrichment(), IMPACT_plot_impact_score(), IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(), IMPACT_process(), IMPACT_query(), IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(), hierarchical_colors()
